name: json-ld
description: JSON-LD structured data — renders a <script type='application/ld+json'> tag for SEO (Article, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, etc.)
whenToUse: Use to embed structured data for SEO — Article, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage schemas.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for visible content. This component renders no visible output.
